itemListElement.reviewBody: Only big in the infrastructure else nothing good in the school. Offer very less salary to their teachers and have very high expectations from them. Don't know how people have given them 5 start, either that are paid or forcefully taken from their staff members only.

itemReviewed.name: Shri Ram Centennial School - Vasant Vihar Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Shri Ram Centennial School  is a vibrant hub of learning land personal growth, where the school community has been exceptionally supportive. I am grateful for the opportunities for professional development and appreciate the collaborative environment.

SRCS is an outstanding institution, renowned for its exceptional organization, experienced and qualified faculties, and warm staff. The school's lovely atmosphere makes it an ideal place for students to thrive and reach their full potential.

itemReviewed.name: Shri Ram Centennial School - Vasant Vihar Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am delighted to share my views as a parent in Shri Ram Centennial School.I feel proud to have my daughter Trisha Chakravorty as a Nursery student in your profound organisation.Shri Ram Centennial School is one of top schools in Indore.Its greenary and the infrastructure is best.It offers a unique blend of academics excellence and eco-friendly practices in the school.The staff members are cooperative and supportive.I am glad to be a part of SRCS family.

itemReviewed.name: Shri Ram Centennial School - Vasant Vihar Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Shri Ram Centennial School, Indore  is undoubtedly one of the best CBSE schools in Indore, equipped with modern amenities, advanced labs, and outstanding faculty. The leadership and mentorship provided by the principal, dean, and faculty are truly exceptional.

The boarding facility at SRCS has set a new standard, making it one of the top boarding schools in the city. I highly recommend SRCS for its dedication to academic excellence and student well-being.

itemReviewed.name: Shri Ram Centennial School - Vasant Vihar Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody: "I am extremely grateful for the exceptional teaching at Shri Ram Centennial School, Indore. The teachers are knowledgeable, patient, and genuinely care about the students' progress. Their innovative teaching methods make learning enjoyable and effective. I have seen remarkable improvement in my child's academic performance and overall confidence. Highly recommend this school for quality education. "

itemReviewed.name: Shri Ram Centennial School - Vasant Vihar Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Shri Ram Centennial School: A combination of everything that a child needs. A school with amazing sports facilities with latest equipments for each and every sport. A school with inspiring teachers, the teachers here make sure that every student gets the concept behind anything they explain. A school which gives chance to all  those who want to attend MUNs and round squares.
A school with jaw-dropping architecture with a lot of trees creating a really good environment to study. A school where seniors are the coolest people for juniors. A school which makes each SRCIAN confident.

itemReviewed.name: Shri Ram Centennial School - Vasant Vihar Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody: I've had a wonderful experience as a sports teacher at Shri Ram Centennial School, Indore. The school provides excellent facilities and a supportive environment for students to excel in both basketball and rifle shooting. The administration and staff are dedicated to nurturing young athletes and fostering a love for sports. I'm proud to be part of such a great institution.

itemReviewed.name: Shri Ram Centennial School - Vasant Vihar Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody: School have excellent facilities like smart classes,wifi campus,big play ground ,well furnished class room. All sports facilities are their like  football swimming ,squash ,table tennis,badminton,shooting. Trained coaches and staff . Hostel have all facilities like beds,hot water,aro water,fresh air away from pollution.Wonderful environment

itemReviewed.name: Shri Ram Centennial School - Vasant Vihar Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Great school and awesome environment. All facilities are present and teachers are very much connected to children and parents.
Very friendly atmosphere and teaches pay personal attention on students. Students make innovative science projevts based on their own ideas. All sports facilities are available and sports academy open for outsiders also.

itemReviewed.name: Shri Ram Centennial School - Vasant Vihar Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody: SRCS is one of the best schools in Indore with great infrastructure, beautiful ambience, spacious and airy classrooms with well trained faculty along with residential facility  Good environment, good management, No.1 school in the Indore city. Career growth is always there. Those who are hardworking and committed to contributing to a student’s personality should join. Good, and amazing workplace. Each and every staff member in Team is sincere and concerned about students
